title: So what happens to the angel souls after Third impact
display_title: So what happens to the angel souls after Third impact
wikitext:
[]: So what happens to the angel souls after Third impact?             Quote Post by orcot » Tue Nov 29, 2022 12:35 pm Afther the end of evangelion all the lilin are turned into free souls that can return if they want to, But What about the angels (adam's children). Give that BNR (big Naked Rei) is a bit of a weird name because it is just as much kaworu it seems sort of odd that the souls of adam aren't discussed. Question do they specifically state that any Lilin soul can return or do they simply say soul (making no difference between lilin and adam). Basickly can the angels return and was it wrong of Shinji to not go into the specifics here?

[]: Re: So what happens to the angel souls after Third impact?             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Sat Dec 03, 2022 12:07 pm I always headcanoned that the Angels, Gendo, SEELE, and any other human souls that don't want to return to Lilin life will go with Yui, who will Seed of Life a new Angelic/Adamic-based world, thus righting the scales that were wronged so many billions of years ago.

[]: Re: So what happens to the angel souls after Third impact?             Quote Post by Angel » Mon Dec 19, 2022 2:14 am Instrumentality includes all living things whose AT fields got popped by GNR's anti-AT field, plus Rei and Kaworu because they carry the souls of the seeds of life, plus Kaji because he's speshul. That does not include Angels.

[]: Re: So what happens to the angel souls after Third impact?             Quote Post by orcot » Sat Jan 07, 2023 9:02 am Angel wrote: Instrumentality includes all living things whose AT fields got popped by GNR's anti-AT field, plus Rei and Kaworu because they carry the souls of the seeds of life, plus Kaji because he's speshul. That does not include Angels.
